adjustment.reason_zh: cycles 命中的 8 个强连通分量(ObservableType↔Observable、操作符工厂↔Producer↔Sink、ReplaySubject 家族)经核对均为 Rx 协议-实现互引的领域固有结构,非失控耦合
adjustment.reason_en: All 8 SCCs flagged by cycles (ObservableType↔Observable, operator factory↔Producer↔Sink trios, the ReplaySubject family) are Rx's inherent protocol-implementation mutual references, not runaway coupling

classes.name: ControlTarget
classes.description_zh: target-action 桥接器，将 `UIControl`/`NSControl` 的控件事件（`UIControl.Event`）转换为 RxSwift 可订阅回调，是 `ControlEvent` 的底层实现基础。
classes.description_en: Target-action bridge that hooks a `UIControl`/`NSControl` event (e.g., `.touchUpInside`) and fires a callback into an Rx pipeline, serving as the foundation for `ControlEvent` observables.

classes.name: DelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: 代理代理基类，拦截 UIKit/AppKit 对象的委托方法调用，并将其广播为 Observable 序列，同时保持对原始 forwardDelegate 的透明转发。
classes.description_en: Base class for all delegate proxies that intercepts UIKit/AppKit delegate method invocations and broadcasts them as Observable sequences while transparently forwarding to the original delegate.

classes.name: DelegateProxyType
classes.description_zh: 代理代理类型协议，定义代理注册、生命周期管理与 `proxy(for:)` 工厂方法，确保每个父对象只存在一个代理实例并可通过工厂按类型扩展。
classes.description_en: Protocol that defines the contract for all delegate proxy types — registration, lifecycle, and the `proxy(for:)` factory — ensuring a single shared proxy instance per parent object and extensible factory dispatch.

classes.name: HasDelegate
classes.description_zh: 标记协议，声明宿主对象拥有 `delegate` 属性，使 `DelegateProxyType` 默认实现可自动读写代理，无需子类手写 `currentDelegate`/`setCurrentDelegate`。
classes.description_en: Marker protocol declaring that a host object has a `delegate` property, allowing `DelegateProxyType` default implementations to automatically get/set the delegate without subclass boilerplate.

classes.name: HasDataSource
classes.description_zh: 标记协议，声明宿主对象拥有 `dataSource` 属性，使 `DelegateProxyType` 默认实现可自动管理数据源代理（适用于 `UITableView`、`UICollectionView` 等）。
classes.description_en: Marker protocol declaring that a host object has a `dataSource` property, enabling `DelegateProxyType` default implementations to manage the data source proxy for types like `UITableView` and `UICollectionView`.

classes.name: HasPrefetchDataSource
classes.description_zh: 标记协议，声明宿主对象拥有 `prefetchDataSource` 属性，使预取数据源（iOS 10+）可统一接入 `DelegateProxyType` 默认代理管理流程。
classes.description_en: Marker protocol (iOS 10+) declaring that a host object has a `prefetchDataSource` property, integrating prefetch data source management into the standard `DelegateProxyType` proxy lifecycle.

classes.name: DelegateProxyFactory
classes.description_zh: 私有工厂类，按父对象类型键控存储代理构造器，在 `proxy(for:)` 时沿类继承链查找并实例化对应的 `DelegateProxy` 子类（支持 `UITableView`→`UIScrollView` 层级复用）。
classes.description_en: Internal factory keyed by parent-object type that stores registered proxy constructors and resolves the correct `DelegateProxy` subclass by walking the parent's class hierarchy during `proxy(for:)`.

classes.name: subscribeProxyDataSource
classes.signature: func subscribeProxyDataSource<DelegateProxy: DelegateProxyType>(ofObject object: DelegateProxy.ParentObject, dataSource: DelegateProxy.Delegate, retainDataSource: Bool, binding: @escaping (DelegateProxy, Event<Element>) -> Void) -> Disposable where DelegateProxy.ParentObject: UIView, DelegateProxy.Delegate: AnyObject
classes.description_zh: 数据源代理订阅的核心自由函数:把序列绑定到控件的 DelegateProxy dataSource,处理保留、主线程断言与解绑时机。
classes.description_en: The core free function for data-source proxy binding — subscribes a sequence onto a control's DelegateProxy dataSource, handling retention, main-thread assertions and unbinding.

classes.description_en: Base class for all RxCocoa target-action bridges that keeps itself alive via a self-retain cycle until `dispose()` is called, implementing `Disposable` to tie the bridge lifetime to an Rx subscription.

classes.name: RxCollectionViewReactiveArrayDataSource
classes.description_zh: `UICollectionView` 的响应式单节数组数据源，接收 Observable 发射的元素数组，更新内部模型并调用 `reloadData()` 刷新集合视图，是 `rx.items` 绑定的底层实现。

classes.name: RxPickerViewArrayDataSource
classes.description_zh: `UIPickerView` 数组数据源基类，实现 `UIPickerViewDataSource` 并持有单组 items 列表，为响应式 picker 绑定提供行数查询和模型存取接口。
classes.description_en: Base array data source for `UIPickerView` that implements `UIPickerViewDataSource` for a single component, storing items and providing row-count and model-lookup methods for reactive picker bindings.

classes.name: RxPickerViewSequenceDataSource
classes.description_zh: 扩展自 `RxPickerViewArrayDataSource` 的响应式序列数据源，遵循 `RxPickerViewDataSourceType`，在 Observable 发射新序列时更新 items 并重载所有组件。
classes.description_en: Reactive sequence data source for `UIPickerView` extending `RxPickerViewArrayDataSource`, conforming to `RxPickerViewDataSourceType`, and reloading all components whenever the bound Observable emits a new sequence.

classes.name: RxTableViewReactiveArrayDataSource
classes.description_zh: `UITableView` 的响应式单节数组数据源，接收 Observable 发射的元素数组，更新内部模型并调用 `reloadData()` 刷新表格视图，是 `rx.items` 绑定的底层实现。
classes.description_en: Reactive single-section array data source for `UITableView` that receives element arrays from an Observable, updates its model store, and calls `reloadData()`, backing the `rx.items` binding operator.

classes.name: RxCollectionViewDataSourcePrefetchingProxy
classes.description_zh: `UICollectionView` 预取数据源的代理代理，将 `collectionView(_:prefetchItemsAt:)` 回调转发为 `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>` 序列，支持 `rx.prefetchItems` 响应式绑定。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UICollectionViewDataSourcePrefetching` that relays `prefetchItemsAt` callbacks through a `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>`, backing the `rx.prefetchItems` Observable on `UICollectionView`.

classes.name: RxCollectionViewDataSourceProxy
classes.description_zh: `UICollectionView` 数据源的代理代理，拦截 `UICollectionViewDataSource` 方法并转发给响应式数据源或原始代理，是 `rx.items` 等集合视图绑定的代理层核心。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UICollectionViewDataSource` that intercepts data source calls and forwards them to the reactive data source or the original delegate, serving as the core proxy layer for `UICollectionView` reactive bindings.

classes.name: RxPickerViewDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UIPickerView` 委托的代理代理，将 `UIPickerViewDelegate` 回调（行标题、视图渲染、选中等）接入 Observable 流，支持 `rx.delegate` 响应式访问。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UIPickerViewDelegate` that routes picker view callbacks (row titles, view rendering, selection) into Observable streams via `rx.delegate`.

classes.name: RxScrollViewDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UIScrollView` 委托的代理代理，优化了 `contentOffset` 的 `BehaviorSubject`/`PublishSubject` 直接派发路径，并通过 `scrollViewDidScroll` 驱动 `rx.contentOffset` 响应式属性。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UIScrollViewDelegate` with optimized `BehaviorSubject` and `PublishSubject` paths for `contentOffset`, directly driving the `rx.contentOffset` reactive property from `scrollViewDidScroll`.

classes.name: RxSearchBarDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UISearchBar` 委托的代理代理，将 `UISearchBarDelegate` 事件（文本变化、搜索按钮点击等）接入 Observable 流，是 `rx.text`、`rx.searchButtonClicked` 等绑定的代理层。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UISearchBarDelegate` that routes search bar events (text changes, search button taps, etc.) into Observable streams, backing `rx.text` and `rx.searchButtonClicked` reactive properties.

classes.name: RxTableViewDataSourcePrefetchingProxy
classes.description_zh: `UITableView` 预取数据源的代理代理，将 `tableView(_:prefetchRowsAt:)` 回调转发为 `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>` 序列，支持 `rx.prefetchRows` 响应式绑定。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UITableViewDataSourcePrefetching` that relays `prefetchRowsAt` callbacks through a `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>`, backing the `rx.prefetchRows` Observable on `UITableView`.

classes.name: RxTableViewDataSourceProxy
classes.description_zh: `UITableView` 数据源的代理代理，拦截 `UITableViewDataSource` 方法并转发给响应式数据源或原始代理，是 `rx.items` 等表格视图绑定的代理层核心。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UITableViewDataSource` that intercepts data source calls and forwards them to the reactive data source or original delegate, serving as the core proxy layer for `UITableView` reactive bindings.

classes.name: controlProperty

classes.description_zh: AppKit 侧的 controlProperty 工厂:基于 NSControl 的 action 机制桥接 getter/setter,构造 macOS 控件的可读写属性。
classes.description_en: The AppKit-side controlProperty factory — bridges getter/setter over NSControl's action mechanism to build read-write properties for macOS controls.

classes.name: TakeUntilSink
classes.description_zh: TakeUntil 算子的订阅级工作者，持续转发源序列元素给下游，直到触发序列（other）发射元素后立即完成并取消所有订阅。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the TakeUntil operator that forwards source elements to the downstream observer until the trigger observable emits its first element, at which point the sequence completes and all subscriptions are disposed.

classes.name: take
classes.signature: func take(until other: some ObservableType) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: takeUntil
classes.signature: @available(*, deprecated, renamed: "take(until:)") func takeUntil(_ other: some ObservableType) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: takeWhile
classes.signature: @available(*, deprecated, renamed: "take(while:)") func takeWhile(_ predicate: @escaping (Element) throws -> Bool) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: ThrottleSink
classes.description_zh: Throttle 算子的订阅级工作者，保证任意两次发射之间至少间隔 dueTime，立即发射首个元素，并在时间窗口内缓存最新元素以便窗口结束时按需补发。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Throttle operator that ensures no two emissions are closer than dueTime apart by emitting the first element immediately and, when latest mode is enabled, scheduling a deferred emit of the most recent unsent element at the end of each time window.

classes.name: throttle
classes.signature: func throttle(_ dueTime: RxTimeInterval, latest: Bool = true, scheduler: SchedulerType) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: TimeoutSink
classes.description_zh: Timeout 算子的订阅级工作者，在源序列每次发射元素后重置超时计时器，若在 dueTime 内无元素到达则切换到备用序列（other）或发射超时错误。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Timeout operator that resets a deadline timer after each source element and, if no element arrives within dueTime, switches to the fallback observable or emits a timeout error to the downstream observer.

classes.name: timeout
classes.signature: func timeout(_ dueTime: RxTimeInterval, scheduler: SchedulerType) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: Timer
classes.description_zh: timer/interval 的 Producer:在指定调度器上按 dueTime 与 period 产生递增整数序列。
classes.description_en: The producer behind timer/interval — emits an increasing integer sequence on the given scheduler according to dueTime and period.

classes.name: interval
classes.signature: static func interval(_ period: RxTimeInterval, scheduler: SchedulerType) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: timer
classes.signature: static func timer(_ dueTime: RxTimeInterval, period: RxTimeInterval? = nil, scheduler: SchedulerType) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: toArray
classes.signature: func toArray() -> Single<[Element]>

classes.name: UsingSink
classes.description_zh: using 操作符的 Sink:把资源的生命周期绑定到序列订阅,终止或释放时一并 dispose 资源。
classes.description_en: The sink for the using operator — ties a resource's lifetime to the sequence subscription, disposing the resource together with the subscription on termination.

classes.name: using
classes.signature: static func using<Resource: Disposable>(_ resourceFactory: @escaping () throws -> Resource, observableFactory: @escaping (Resource) throws -> Observable<Element>) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: WindowTimeCountSink
classes.description_zh: Window 算子的订阅级工作者，将源元素分配到由 PublishSubject 支撑的滑动窗口 Observable 中，当窗口满或时间到期时完成当前窗口并开启新窗口，每个窗口 Observable 作为元素发射给下游。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Window operator that routes source elements into PublishSubject-backed window observables, completing the current window and opening a new one whenever the element count or time span limit is reached, emitting each window observable downstream.

classes.name: window
classes.signature: func window(timeSpan: RxTimeInterval, count: Int, scheduler: SchedulerType) -> Observable<Observable<Element>>

classes.name: WithLatestFromSink
classes.description_zh: WithLatestFrom 算子的订阅级工作者，订阅第二个源以持续跟踪其最新值，当第一个源（self）发射元素时将其与第二个源的最新值通过 resultSelector 组合后发射给下游。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the WithLatestFrom operator that tracks the latest value of the second source sequence and, on each emission from the first source, combines it with that cached value via the result selector and forwards the result to the downstream observer.

classes.name: withLatestFrom
classes.signature: func withLatestFrom<Source: ObservableConvertibleType, ResultType>(_ second: Source, resultSelector: @escaping (Element, Source.Element) throws -> ResultType) -> Observable<ResultType>

classes.name: withUnretained
classes.signature: func withUnretained<Object: AnyObject, Out>( _ obj: Object, resultSelector: @escaping (Object, Element) -> Out ) -> Observable<Out>

classes.name: ZipCollectionTypeSink
classes.description_zh: 集合版 Zip 算子的订阅级工作者，为集合中每个源序列维护一个元素队列，只有当所有源在同一索引位置均已产生元素时才调用结果选择函数并发射组合结果（按索引严格配对）。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the collection-based Zip operator that maintains an element queue per source and emits a combined result via the result selector only when all sources in the collection have each produced an element at the same positional index.

classes.name: zip
classes.signature: static func zip<Collection: Swift.Collection>(_ collection: Collection, resultSelector: @escaping ([Collection.Element.Element]) throws -> Element) -> Observable<Element> where Collection.Element: ObservableType

classes.name: ZipSink2_
classes.description_zh: zip 的 2 元特化 Sink:在 ZipSink 基类上为 2 个源各维护一个队列,凑齐同下标元素后调用结果选择器发出组合值。
classes.description_en: The 2-source specialization of ZipSink — keeps one queue per source on top of the ZipSink base and applies the result selector once every source has delivered its element at the same index.

classes.name: ZipSink3_
classes.description_zh: zip 的 3 元特化 Sink:在 ZipSink 基类上为 3 个源各维护一个队列,凑齐同下标元素后调用结果选择器发出组合值。
classes.description_en: The 3-source specialization of ZipSink — keeps one queue per source on top of the ZipSink base and applies the result selector once every source has delivered its element at the same index.

classes.name: ZipSink4_
classes.description_zh: zip 的 4 元特化 Sink:在 ZipSink 基类上为 4 个源各维护一个队列,凑齐同下标元素后调用结果选择器发出组合值。
classes.description_en: The 4-source specialization of ZipSink — keeps one queue per source on top of the ZipSink base and applies the result selector once every source has delivered its element at the same index.

classes.name: ZipSink5_
classes.description_zh: zip 的 5 元特化 Sink:在 ZipSink 基类上为 5 个源各维护一个队列,凑齐同下标元素后调用结果选择器发出组合值。
classes.description_en: The 5-source specialization of ZipSink — keeps one queue per source on top of the ZipSink base and applies the result selector once every source has delivered its element at the same index.

classes.name: ZipSink6_
classes.description_zh: zip 的 6 元特化 Sink:在 ZipSink 基类上为 6 个源各维护一个队列,凑齐同下标元素后调用结果选择器发出组合值。
classes.description_en: The 6-source specialization of ZipSink — keeps one queue per source on top of the ZipSink base and applies the result selector once every source has delivered its element at the same index.

classes.name: ZipSink7_
classes.description_zh: zip 的 7 元特化 Sink:在 ZipSink 基类上为 7 个源各维护一个队列,凑齐同下标元素后调用结果选择器发出组合值。
classes.description_en: The 7-source specialization of ZipSink — keeps one queue per source on top of the ZipSink base and applies the result selector once every source has delivered its element at the same index.

classes.name: ZipSink8_
classes.description_zh: zip 的 8 元特化 Sink:在 ZipSink 基类上为 8 个源各维护一个队列,凑齐同下标元素后调用结果选择器发出组合值。
classes.description_en: The 8-source specialization of ZipSink — keeps one queue per source on top of the ZipSink base and applies the result selector once every source has delivered its element at the same index.

classes.name: zip
classes.signature: static func zip<O1: ObservableType, O2: ObservableType> (_ source1: O1, _ source2: O2, resultSelector: @escaping (O1.Element, O2.Element) throws -> Element) -> Observable<Element>

classes.name: ZipSink
classes.description_zh: Zip 系列算子共用的抽象 Sink 基类，跟踪每个源是否已提供当前索引的元素，仅在所有源在同一索引处均有值时才通过 getResult() 计算并发射组合结果。
classes.description_en: The abstract base Sink shared by all Zip arity variants that tracks per-source element availability at each index and emits a combined result via getResult() only when every source has produced an element at the current positional index.

classes.name: ZipObserver
classes.description_zh: Zip 算子中每个源序列对应的独立观察者，负责线程安全地将新到达的元素存入父 Sink 维护的队列，并通知父 ZipSinkProtocol 协调索引配对与合并逻辑。
classes.description_en: The per-source observer used by Zip that thread-safely enqueues each arriving element into the parent Sink's positional queue and notifies the parent ZipSinkProtocol to coordinate index-aligned pairing and result emission.

layers.name: Observers
layers.summary: Observer implementations and tail-recursive sinks that receive and forward events down a subscription.

classes.name: ObserverBase
classes.description_zh: 观察者基类:用原子标志保证 next 只在未终止时转发、error/completed 只投递一次,并兼任 Disposable。
classes.description_en: The observer base class — uses an atomic flag so next is forwarded only before termination and error/completed are delivered exactly once, doubling as a Disposable.

layers.name: Subjects & Relays
layers.summary: Multicasting hot sources that are both Observable and Observer — Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async subjects and their error-free Relay wrappers.

classes.name: bind
classes.signature: func bind(to relays: PublishRelay<Element>...) -> Disposable

classes.name: rxFatalErrorInDebug
classes.signature: func rxFatalErrorInDebug(_ lastMessage: @autoclosure () -> String, file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line)

classes.name: BehaviorSubject
classes.description_zh: 热序列多播 Subject，缓存最新一个值并在新订阅者订阅时立即将其重放，同时将后续事件广播给所有活跃观察者。
classes.description_en: A hot multicast subject that caches the single most-recent value and immediately replays it to each new subscriber, then broadcasts all subsequent events to all active observers.

classes.name: PublishSubject
classes.description_zh: 热序列多播 Subject，不缓存任何历史值，仅将订阅后产生的事件广播给当时已注册的所有观察者。
classes.description_en: A hot multicast subject that buffers no history and only broadcasts events occurring after subscription to all currently registered observers.

classes.name: ReplaySubject
classes.description_zh: 热序列多播 Subject，以可配置的缓冲区（有界或无界）重放历史值给新订阅者，并将后续事件广播给所有观察者。
classes.description_en: A hot multicast subject that replays a configurable buffer of past values (bounded or unbounded) to each new subscriber and then forwards subsequent events to all observers.

layers.name: Schedulers
layers.summary: Abstractions over where and when work runs — serial/concurrent dispatch, main-thread, operation-queue and virtual-time schedulers.

classes.name: MainScheduler
classes.description_zh: 将工作调度到主线程（DispatchQueue.main）的串行调度器，当调用已在主队列上发生时直接同步执行以避免额外的异步跳转，专为 UI 操作优化。
classes.description_en: A serial scheduler targeting DispatchQueue.main that executes work synchronously in-place when already on the main queue, optimized for UI work via the observeOn operator.

classes.name: AnyRecursiveScheduler
classes.description_zh: 类型擦除的递归调度器:让动作可以安全地把自身重新调度(立即或延时),内部用 CompositeDisposable 管理所有挂起任务。
classes.description_en: A type-erased recursive scheduler that lets an action safely reschedule itself (immediately or after a delay), tracking all pending work in a CompositeDisposable.

classes.name: SchedulePeriodicRecursive
classes.description_zh: 周期调度的递归模拟:在只支持单次调度的调度器上,用 tick/dispatchStart 命令递归实现 schedulePeriodic。
classes.description_en: Emulates periodic scheduling recursively — implements schedulePeriodic on top of single-shot scheduling by recursing tick/dispatchStart commands.

classes.name: VirtualTimeScheduler
classes.description_zh: 基于优先队列的虚拟时间调度器基类，通过手动推进虚拟时钟来按绝对或相对虚拟时间顺序执行已调度的工作，主要用于测试场景。
classes.description_en: A base virtual-time scheduler backed by a priority queue that executes scheduled work in virtual-clock order by manually advancing the clock, serving as the foundation for deterministic testing schedulers.

classes.name: DispatchQueueConfiguration
classes.description_zh: 持有底层 DispatchQueue 和计时器精度（leeway）的内部值类型，为 SerialDispatchQueueScheduler 提供立即调度、延迟调度和周期性调度的具体实现。
classes.description_en: An internal value type holding a DispatchQueue and leeway that provides the concrete implementations of immediate, delayed, and periodic scheduling used by SerialDispatchQueueScheduler.

classes.name: ScheduledItem
classes.description_zh: 封装单个可调度工作单元（action + state）的内部值类型，实现 ScheduledItemType 以支持调用与取消，由 CurrentThreadScheduler 的队列使用。
classes.description_en: An internal value type encapsulating a single schedulable work unit (action and state) that implements ScheduledItemType for invocation and cancellation, used by the CurrentThreadScheduler's trampoline queue.

layers.name: Concurrency & Locks
layers.summary: Low-level synchronization primitives — recursive locks and the Synchronized* mixins guarding event delivery.

classes.name: performLocked
classes.signature: @inline(__always) final func performLocked<T>(_ action: () -> T) -> T

classes.name: SynchronizedOnType
classes.description_zh: 同步投递混入协议:on(_:) 先取锁再调用 synchronized_on,保证事件进入 Sink 时的互斥。
classes.description_en: The synchronized-delivery mixin protocol — on(_:) takes the lock before calling synchronized_on, guaranteeing mutual exclusion as events enter a sink.

layers.name: Disposables
layers.summary: Subscription lifecycle and cancellation — the Disposable family plus DisposeBag/CompositeDisposable resource management.

classes.name: create
classes.signature: static func create(with dispose: @escaping () -> Void) -> Cancelable

classes.name: create
classes.signature: static func create(_ disposable1: Disposable, _ disposable2: Disposable) -> Cancelable

classes.name: CompositeDisposable
classes.description_zh: 将多个 Disposable 聚合为一组，调用 dispose() 时原子性地取消全部成员订阅，并在已释放后立即处理任何新插入的 Disposable。
classes.description_en: Aggregates multiple disposables into a single group, atomically cancelling all members on dispose and immediately disposing any newly inserted disposable when the composite is already disposed.

classes.name: create
classes.signature: static func create(_ disposable1: Disposable, _ disposable2: Disposable, _ disposable3: Disposable) -> Cancelable

classes.name: Disposables
classes.description_zh: Disposable 的命名空间工厂:create 系列静态方法是构造匿名与组合释放器的统一入口。
classes.description_en: The factory namespace for disposables — the static create overloads are the uniform entry point for building anonymous and composite disposables.

classes.name: disposed
classes.signature: func disposed(by bag: DisposeBag)

classes.name: create
classes.signature: static func create() -> Disposable

classes.name: SerialDisposable
classes.description_zh: 持有单个可替换 Disposable 的串行容器，每次替换内部 disposable 时自动取消前一个，整体 dispose 后所有后续赋值也会立即被取消。
classes.description_en: A serial disposable container holding one inner disposable at a time, automatically cancelling the previous one upon replacement and immediately disposing any future assignments once the container itself is disposed.

classes.name: SingleAssignmentDisposable
classes.description_zh: 仅允许设置一次底层 Disposable 的单次赋值容器，若在赋值前 dispose 则在赋值时立即取消，用于桥接异步创建的订阅与其取消令牌。
classes.description_en: A single-assignment disposable container that permits setting its inner disposable exactly once, immediately cancelling it if disposal occurred before the assignment, used to bridge asynchronously created subscriptions with their cancellation tokens.

layers.name: Core Abstractions
layers.summary: The fundamental Rx contracts — Observable/Observer/Event/Scheduler protocols and the base sequence machinery every other subsystem builds on.

classes.name: asObserver
classes.signature: func asObserver() -> AnyObserver<Element>

classes.name: mapObserver
classes.signature: func mapObserver<Result>(_ transform: @escaping (Result) throws -> Element) -> AnyObserver<Result>

classes.name: Binder
classes.description_zh: 专为 UI 绑定设计的 ObserverType 实现，弱持有目标对象、强制在指定调度器（默认主线程）上执行绑定，并在调试模式下禁止错误事件传入。
classes.description_en: A UI-binding-oriented ObserverType that weakly retains its target, dispatches value delivery on a specified scheduler (main by default), and fatal-errors on received error events in debug builds.

classes.name: Cancelable
classes.description_zh: 在 Disposable 基础上增加 isDisposed 状态查询能力的协议，代表可追踪释放状态的可取消资源。
classes.description_en: A Disposable sub-protocol that adds an isDisposed property, representing a cancellable resource whose disposal state can be inspected at runtime.

classes.name: map
classes.signature: func map(_ transform: (Int, Double) -> Int) -> DispatchTimeInterval

classes.name: reduceWithSpanBetween
classes.signature: func reduceWithSpanBetween(earlierDate: Date, laterDate: Date) -> DispatchTimeInterval

classes.name: addingDispatchInterval
classes.signature: func addingDispatchInterval(_ dispatchInterval: DispatchTimeInterval) -> Date

classes.name: Disposable
classes.description_zh: 表示可取消资源的基础协议:唯一的 dispose() 方法定义了 Rx 中一切订阅与资源释放的契约。
classes.description_en: The base protocol for cancellable resources — its single dispose() method defines the contract every Rx subscription and resource release obeys.

classes.name: asObservable
classes.signature: func asObservable(priority: TaskPriority? = nil) -> Observable<Element>
classes.description_zh: 把 Swift Concurrency 的 AsyncSequence 桥接为 Observable:在 detached Task 中迭代,把元素、完成与错误转发给观察者。
classes.description_en: Bridges a Swift Concurrency AsyncSequence into an Observable — iterates it inside a detached Task and forwards elements, completion and errors to the observer.

classes.name: Observable
classes.description_zh: ObservableType 的类型擦除具体类，是 RxSwift 中所有推送式序列的公共基类，通过抽象的 subscribe 方法强制子类实现订阅逻辑。
classes.description_en: The concrete type-erased base class for all push-based sequences in RxSwift, implementing ObservableType with an abstract subscribe method that subclasses must override to define emission logic.

classes.name: subscribe
classes.signature: func subscribe(_ on: @escaping (Event<Element>) -> Void) -> Disposable

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: 可订阅序列的核心协议:在 ObservableConvertibleType 之上定义 subscribe(_:),是全部操作符扩展的挂载点。
classes.description_en: The core protocol for subscribable sequences — adds subscribe(_:) on top of ObservableConvertibleType and is the anchor every operator extension hangs off.

classes.name: ObserverType
classes.description_zh: 事件接收方的核心协议:on(_:) 接收 next/error/completed 事件,与 ObservableType 构成 Rx 的双向契约。
classes.description_en: The core protocol for event receivers — on(_:) accepts next/error/completed events, forming the other half of Rx's observable/observer contract.

classes.name: rxAbstractMethod
classes.signature: func rxAbstractMethod(file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line) -> Swift.Never

classes.name: rxFatalError
classes.signature: func rxFatalError(_ lastMessage: @autoclosure () -> String, file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line) -> Swift.Never

classes.name: rxFatalErrorInDebug
classes.signature: func rxFatalErrorInDebug(_ lastMessage: @autoclosure () -> String, file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line)

classes.name: incrementChecked
classes.signature: func incrementChecked(_ i: inout Int) throws -> Int

classes.name: decrementChecked
classes.signature: func decrementChecked(_ i: inout Int) throws -> Int

classes.name: SynchronizationTracker
classes.description_zh: 仅在 DEBUG 模式下启用的并发诊断工具类，通过追踪跨线程的重入调用来检测违反 Rx 事件语法（next* (error|completed)?）的同步异常。
classes.description_en: A DEBUG-only diagnostic class that tracks per-thread reentrancy to detect synchronization anomalies — concurrent or overlapping event emissions that violate the Rx observable grammar.

classes.name: SchedulerType
classes.description_zh: 在 ImmediateSchedulerType 基础上扩展时间感知能力的调度器协议，支持相对延迟调度和周期性任务调度，是所有带时间语义调度器的统一契约。
classes.description_en: A time-aware scheduler protocol extending ImmediateSchedulerType with scheduleRelative and schedulePeriodic, forming the unified contract for all schedulers that understand wall-clock time.

classes.name: dispatch
classes.signature: @inline(__always) func dispatch<Element>(_ bag: Bag<(Event<Element>) -> Void>, _ event: Event<Element>)

classes.name: disposeAll
classes.signature: func disposeAll(in bag: Bag<Disposable>)

classes.name: toIntMax
classes.signature: func toIntMax() -> IntMax

layers.name: Platform & Data Structures
layers.summary: Platform abstraction (Darwin/Linux, atomics, dispatch helpers) and the internal Bag/Queue/PriorityQueue data structures.

classes.name: AtomicInt
classes.description_zh: 跨平台原子整数:NSLock 子类提供 add/sub/fetchOr 等原子操作,支撑 Sink 与 Disposable 的无竞态状态机。
classes.description_en: The cross-platform atomic integer — an NSLock subclass exposing add/sub/fetchOr, underpinning the race-free state machines of sinks and disposables.

classes.name: add
classes.signature: @discardableResult @inline(__always) func add(_ this: AtomicInt, _ value: Int32) -> Int32

classes.name: sub
classes.signature: @discardableResult @inline(__always) func sub(_ this: AtomicInt, _ value: Int32) -> Int32

classes.name: decrement
classes.signature: @discardableResult @inline(__always) func decrement(_ this: AtomicInt) -> Int32
classes.description_zh: 对 AtomicInt 值执行线程安全的原子自减（-1），与 increment 对称，用于引用计数递减。
classes.description_en: Atomically decrements an `AtomicInt` value by 1 under lock, the symmetric counterpart to `increment` used to release reference counts and decrement state flags.

classes.name: isFlagSet
classes.signature: @inline(__always) func isFlagSet(_ this: AtomicInt, _ mask: Int32) -> Bool
classes.description_zh: 原子地读取 AtomicInt 并用位掩码检测特定标志位是否置位，用于线程安全地查询 disposed/started 等状态位。
classes.description_en: Atomically reads an `AtomicInt` and tests a bitmask flag, providing a thread-safe way to query boolean state bits (e.g., disposed, started) without a separate lock.

classes.name: setThreadLocalStorageValue
classes.signature: static func setThreadLocalStorageValue(_ value: (some AnyObject)?, forKey key: NSCopying)

classes.name: getThreadLocalStorageValueForKey
classes.signature: static func getThreadLocalStorageValueForKey<T>(_ key: NSCopying) -> T?

classes.name: setThreadLocalStorageValue
classes.signature: static func setThreadLocalStorageValue(_ value: (some AnyObject)?, forKey key: String)

classes.name: getThreadLocalStorageValueForKey
classes.signature: static func getThreadLocalStorageValueForKey<T: AnyObject>(_ key: String) -> T?

classes.name: RecursiveLock
classes.description_zh: 库级递归锁(NSRecursiveLock 子类):整个 RxSwift 的互斥基元,在 TRACE_RESOURCES 下参与资源计数。
classes.description_en: The library-wide recursive lock (an NSRecursiveLock subclass) — RxSwift's mutual-exclusion primitive, participating in resource counting under TRACE_RESOURCES.

classes.signature: func == (lhs: BagKey, rhs: BagKey) -> Bool

flows.name: 委托代理桥接 · Delegate Proxy Bridge
flows.description: RxCocoa 的招牌机制:DelegateProxyType 拦截 UIKit/AppKit 的 delegate 与 dataSource 回调,派发给每个具体代理(ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView 等),将命令式回调转成 Observable 流。 · RxCocoa's signature mechanism: DelegateProxyType intercepts UIKit/AppKit delegate and dataSource callbacks and dispatches to each concrete proxy (ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView …), turning imperative callbacks into Observable streams.
flows.description_zh: RxCocoa 的招牌机制:DelegateProxyType 拦截 UIKit/AppKit 的 delegate 与 dataSource 回调,派发给每个具体代理(ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView 等),将命令式回调转成 Observable 流。
flows.description_en: RxCocoa's signature mechanism: DelegateProxyType intercepts UIKit/AppKit delegate and dataSource callbacks and dispatches to each concrete proxy (ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView …), turning imperative callbacks into Observable streams.

flows.name: 资源释放与取消 · Disposal & Cancellation
flows.description: DisposeBag 作为聚合根,统一持有并在释放时取消所有 Disposable 实现(Sink、SerialDisposable、订阅句柄等),构成 Rx 的确定性资源回收机制。 · DisposeBag is the aggregate root that holds and, on dispose, cancels every Disposable implementor (sinks, serial disposables, subscription handles), giving Rx its deterministic resource teardown.
flows.description_zh: DisposeBag 作为聚合根,统一持有并在释放时取消所有 Disposable 实现(Sink、SerialDisposable、订阅句柄等),构成 Rx 的确定性资源回收机制。
flows.description_en: DisposeBag is the aggregate root that holds and, on dispose, cancels every Disposable implementor (sinks, serial disposables, subscription handles), giving Rx its deterministic resource teardown.

flows.name: 订阅与事件分发 · Subscription & Event Dispatch
flows.description: Rx 的订阅核心:ObservableType.subscribe 委托给具体的 Producer,后者创建对应 Sink 并经 SinkDisposer 串接上下游,把推送式事件沿订阅链分发(主题亦多播给各订阅者)。 · Rx's subscription core: ObservableType.subscribe dispatches to a concrete Producer, which builds the operator's Sink and wires up/downstream through a SinkDisposer to push events along the chain (subjects multicast to their subscribers).
flows.description_zh: Rx 的订阅核心:ObservableType.subscribe 委托给具体的 Producer,后者创建对应 Sink 并经 SinkDisposer 串接上下游,把推送式事件沿订阅链分发(主题亦多播给各订阅者)。
flows.description_en: Rx's subscription core: ObservableType.subscribe dispatches to a concrete Producer, which builds the operator's Sink and wires up/downstream through a SinkDisposer to push events along the chain (subjects multicast to their subscribers).

flows.name: 主题多播 · Subject Multicasting
flows.description: 主题(Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async)既是 Observer 又是 Observable:用内部 Bag 持有订阅者,把收到的事件多播出去,是命令式代码注入 Rx 流的桥梁。 · Subjects (Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async) are both Observer and Observable: they hold subscribers in an internal Bag and multicast received events outward — the bridge that injects imperative code into Rx streams.
flows.description_zh: 主题(Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async)既是 Observer 又是 Observable:用内部 Bag 持有订阅者,把收到的事件多播出去,是命令式代码注入 Rx 流的桥梁。
flows.description_en: Subjects (Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async) are both Observer and Observable: they hold subscribers in an internal Bag and multicast received events outward — the bridge that injects imperative code into Rx streams.

flows.name: 高阶映射与合并 · FlatMap & Merge
flows.description: flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge 等高阶操作符把"序列的序列"展开:MergeSink 订阅内层 Observable 并把其元素合流到下游,是 Rx 异步编排的枢纽。 · The higher-order operators (flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge) flatten an observable-of-observables: a MergeSink subscribes to each inner Observable and merges its elements downstream — the hub of Rx async orchestration.
flows.description_zh: flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge 等高阶操作符把"序列的序列"展开:MergeSink 订阅内层 Observable 并把其元素合流到下游,是 Rx 异步编排的枢纽。
flows.description_en: The higher-order operators (flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge) flatten an observable-of-observables: a MergeSink subscribes to each inner Observable and merges its elements downstream — the hub of Rx async orchestration.

flows.name: 组合最新值 · Combine Latest
flows.description: combineLatest 把多个源的最新值组合:任一源发出新元素时,用所有源各自的最新值算出组合结果,常用于聚合多路状态。 · combineLatest composes the latest values of several sources: whenever any source emits, it produces a combined result from every source's most-recent element — the workhorse for aggregating multiple states.
flows.description_zh: combineLatest 把多个源的最新值组合:任一源发出新元素时,用所有源各自的最新值算出组合结果,常用于聚合多路状态。
flows.description_en: combineLatest composes the latest values of several sources: whenever any source emits, it produces a combined result from every source's most-recent element — the workhorse for aggregating multiple states.

flows.name: 按索引配对 · Zip
flows.description: zip 按下标严格配对多个源:只有当每个源都产出第 n 个元素时才发出第 n 个组合结果,用于把并行序列对齐成元组。 · zip pairs sources strictly by index: it emits the n-th combined result only once every source has produced its n-th element, aligning parallel sequences into tuples.
flows.description_zh: zip 按下标严格配对多个源:只有当每个源都产出第 n 个元素时才发出第 n 个组合结果,用于把并行序列对齐成元组。
flows.description_en: zip pairs sources strictly by index: it emits the n-th combined result only once every source has produced its n-th element, aligning parallel sequences into tuples.
